name: Alder - 18x30 Modern Monoslope Roof Shed | Spacious Backyard Studio, Workshop & Storage Building (PDF)
open_features: A bold single-slope roofline creates striking contemporary architecture while improving water runoff and structural efficiency.
With 540 square feet of usable space, Alder offers ample room for workshops, studios, offices, storage, or future living conversions.
Clean framing lines, practical dimensions, and a straightforward roof structure make this design approachable for DIY builders and professionals alike.
Strategically positioned doors and windows allow natural daylight to fill the interior while promoting fresh airflow and easy access.
description_summary: Elevate your backyard with the Alder 18x30 Monoslope Roof Shed - a large, modern outdoor structure crafted for versatility, efficiency, and bold architectural style. Showcasing a sleek single-slope roofline, warm horizontal wood siding, and crisp contemporary detailing, Alder offers a refined exterior paired with expansive interior potential. With an impressive 540 square feet of flexible space, this structure is ideal for homeowners looking to create something more than just a storage shed....
